checks.name: all AP-E6 and canonical Workline-B sources exist and are hashed
hedgehog has no continuous internal stabilizer and orbit dimension three
physical hedgehog orbit is SO(3), not CP1
uniform scalar CP1 orientation has volume-divergent L2 norm
canonical Workline-B (r,F,s) checksum equals the published B card
canonical Workline-B coupled profile remains a unit B=1 hedgehog

checks.detail: Phi_F -> beta M, Phi_F^2 -> M^2, so the essential threshold is |M|
checks.name: the chiral Yukawa mass is invertible at infinity

checks.detail: Phi_infinity/|M|=sgn(M) beta is constant; E_+ is trivial and Ind=0
checks.name: ordinary S2-infinity Callias positive-eigenbundle class is trivial

checks.detail: Ind(d_tau+H_tau)=SF(H_tau)=B conditionally; ker H_endpoint is not fixed
checks.name: four-dimensional spectral flow is kept distinct from a static endpoint kernel
finite Wilson Hamiltonians are Hermitian
benchmark finite boxes have no accidental endpoint zero mode
right-U1 representatives of one CP1 point give different hedgehog operators
the representative ambiguity is nevertheless unitary isospectral
minimal two-band asymptotic mass cannot realize c1=x+2y
rank-three spectator Veronese template has an exact O(2) kernel line
spectator Berry control returns c1=+2
finite regulated determinant obeys CPT complex conjugation
Majorana-doubled Pfaffian control obeys the same conjugation law

checks.detail: physical moduli are SO(3); K_CP1 tensor E^vee remains a spectator rule
checks.name: anti-canonical O(-4) is not assigned without a physical CP1 polarization

checks.detail: Xi5_hat=2 pr_U^* omega3_hat cup pr_s^* c1_hat(Hopf) in Hhat^5(SU2 x CP1); int_Sigma3 ev^* Xi5_hat in Hhat^2(C_restricted)
checks.name: universal degree-five character and degree-two family transgression are correctly typed
sampled constant-loop level-two phases satisfy the local integrality control

checks.detail: phase=[1.0, -2.4492935982947064e-16]; necessary control, not an exactly-two theorem
checks.name: even Hopf weight has trivial phase for the tested faithful Z2 element
level-one negative control has nontrivial faithful Z2 holonomy

checks.detail: no stabilizer occurs on S3 -> CP1 before the faithful Z2 identification
checks.name: restricted nonvanishing-Higgs Hopf action is free

checks.detail: all Map(Sigma3,U1) components, equivariant cocycles, vertical holonomy, zeros/defects, and nontrivial bundles remain open
checks.name: neither restricted stack descent nor full microscopic descent is promoted

cpt_scope.conditional_pfaffian_law: under the Theta and orientation assumptions, Pf A[CPT Phi]=conjugate(Pf A[Phi])
cpt_scope.conditional_regulator_law: under the Theta assumptions, Z_PV[CPT Phi]=conjugate(Z_PV[Phi])
cpt_scope.cp1_anti_canonical_rule: K_CP1 tensor E^vee=O(-4) only if the physical CP1 family and polarization exist
cpt_scope.finite_test_status: algebraic finite spectral-product regression, not a physical regulator construction
theta_assumptions: Theta is antiunitary and Theta i Theta^{-1}=-i
Theta maps the operator, domain, boundary conditions, and spectral cut to their CPT images
the fermion and Pauli-Villars representations are Theta-closed and regulator masses are real
the determinant/Pfaffian orientation is transported consistently

gauge_descent_scope.evaluation: ev: Sigma3 x C_restricted -> SU2 x CP1, (x,c)->(U_c(x),s_c(x))
gauge_descent_scope.local_status: well-typed local differential-character ansatz plus constant-loop phase controls
gauge_descent_scope.stabilizer: the tested faithful Z2 phase is trivial for even weight, a necessary control but not an exactly-two theorem
gauge_descent_scope.universal_differential_character: Xi5_hat=2 pr_U^*omega3_hat cup pr_s^*c1_hat(Hopf) in Hhat^5(SU2 x CP1)

gauge_holonomy_controls.universal_character_typing: Xi5_hat=2 pr_U^* omega3_hat cup pr_s^* c1_hat(Hopf) in Hhat^5(SU2 x CP1)

operator_audit.asymptotic_mass: Phi_infinity=beta M (not M times the identity)
operator_audit.asymptotic_positive_eigenbundle: constant positive eigenspace of sgn(M) beta, hence a trivial rank-four bundle over S2_infinity
callias_assumptions: R3 is complete and D_3 is self-adjoint on H^1
Phi_F is bounded and Hermitian and [D_3,Phi_F] extends boundedly
outside a compact set Phi_F^2-||[D_3,Phi_F]|| >= epsilon > 0
gauge connection is smooth and decays so H_F-H_infinity is relatively compact
operator_audit.callias_operator: C_F=D_3+i Phi_F: H^1 -> L^2; graded double B_F=[[0,C_F^dagger],[C_F,0]]
operator_audit.ordinary_callias_index_scope: only under the explicitly listed domain, bounded-commutator, coercivity, and decay assumptions
operator_audit.physical_domain: Dom(H_F)=H^1(R3,S tensor C2); H_F is self-adjoint under the stated smooth-decaying gauge assumptions
operator_audit.static_3d: H_F=D_3+Phi_F, D_3=-i alpha^i D_i, Phi_F=beta M(cos F+i gamma5 tau.rhat sin F)

two_band_obstruction.reason: positive eigenline of a 2x2 mass pulls back u from CP1, hence c1^2=0

remaining_blockers: Derive the relaxed B=1 symmetry orbit from the full gauge-meson solution; the present hedgehog gives SO(3), not CP1.
Produce a localized normalisable CP1 zero mode rather than the volume-divergent uniform scalar vacuum orientation.
Derive a microscopic Yukawa representation and regulator whose asymptotic eigenbundle has the required mixed topology; the minimal two-band construction is obstructed.
Prove a full uniform endpoint spectral gap and compute the actual families determinant/Pfaffian line.
Extend the restricted Higgsed sigma-model differential character across all microscopic gauge bundles, zeros, defects, and non-extendible sectors.
Only after one complete lane closes may a degree-one Route-E portal be constructed.

same_profile.breathing_scalar_treatment: s is decoupled by the declared Yukawa M U^gamma5; no s-dependent Yukawa coupling is claimed
same_profile.wilson_profile_source: canonical r,F,s card-bound arrays; F linearly interpolated off-grid

symmetry_and_moduli.actual_free_c1_target: H^2(SO(3);Z) has no free Z summand; on the SU2 cover H^2(S3;Z)=0
